collections.title: Office & Work Space Design
collections.description: Office and workspace designs for MERJAS across multiple Muscat locations — from a refined modern scheme to a raw industrial one. Explore each project individually.

projects.title: Villa Al Ansab
projects.description: A warm, contemporary facade designed to harmonise with the Omani landscape while asserting a bold modern identity.
projects.overview: A contemporary two-storey villa defined by clean cubic volumes and a warm, tactile material palette. The facade balances bold modern geometry with the soft tones of the Omani landscape — microcement surfaces in off-white and warm beige, framed by dark aluminium and recessed linear lighting that brings the architecture to life after dusk.

slides.caption: The villa at dusk — interlocking cubic volumes wrapped in warm microcement, where concealed linear LED lighting traces the architecture and gives the facade a quiet, glowing presence against the evening sky.
A study in detail: the crisp meeting of off-white and warm beige microcement, dark aluminium window frames, and a recessed linear light that washes warmth down the soffit.
The material story — microcement in off-white and warm beige, paired with dark aluminium framing and glass. Each surface was chosen to age gracefully and sit in harmony with its surroundings.

The full material language of the project: warm beige microcement, dark aluminium frames, advanced clear glazing, and linear LED lighting — assembled into a facade that is both timeless and unmistakably modern.

sections.title: Concept & Massing
sections.description: The design emerges from a study of the Omani vernacular — interlocking cubic volumes that create shadow and depth in the harsh afternoon sun. Each form was positioned deliberately to frame internal courtyards and capture the prevailing breeze, balancing openness with the need for privacy and shade.

renders.caption: The villa at dusk — interlocking cubic volumes wrapped in warm microcement, where concealed linear LED lighting traces the architecture and gives the facade a quiet, glowing presence against the evening sky.
A study in detail: the crisp meeting of off-white and warm beige microcement, dark aluminium window frames, and a recessed linear light that washes warmth down the soffit.

sections.title: Material Language
sections.description: Every material was selected for its ability to age gracefully in the Omani climate. Microcement in two tones — off-white and warm beige — forms the primary skin, while dark aluminium frames define the apertures with precision. Advanced clear glazing maximises daylight without sacrificing thermal performance.

renders.caption: The material story — microcement in off-white and warm beige, paired with dark aluminium framing and glass. Each surface was chosen to age gracefully and sit in harmony with its surroundings.

sections.title: Night Presence
sections.description: Concealed linear LED lighting was integrated into every horizontal soffit, transforming the facade after dusk. The lighting traces the geometry of the volumes, creating a warm, glowing presence that reads as unmistakably modern yet quietly restrained.

renders.caption: The full material language of the project: warm beige microcement, dark aluminium frames, advanced clear glazing, and linear LED lighting — assembled into a facade that is both timeless and unmistakably modern.

projects.title: Al-Ozaiba Office
projects.description: A sleek, modern headquarters for MERJAS in Al-Ozaiba — a refined monochrome palette of black, white and grey, glass-walled offices, backlit display niches, and soft velvet seating threaded with greenery.
projects.overview: An office and workspace design for MERJAS at its Al-Ozaiba location, in a refined modern language. A disciplined palette of black, white and grey is paired with slim black-framed glass partitions, backlit display niches, recessed linear lighting, and soft velvet furniture — with greenery threading through executive offices, meeting rooms, and bright open work zones.

sections.title: Executive Office
sections.description: A private executive office in a refined monochrome palette, where a sculptural black desk meets backlit display niches and soft velvet seating beneath recessed linear light.

renders.caption: The executive office — a sculptural black desk, warm backlit display niches, and rounded velvet armchairs set against crisp white joinery and grey tile.

sections.title: Private Office
sections.description: A glass-walled private office framed in slim black steel, balancing transparency with focus.

renders.caption: A private office read through black-framed glass — modern joinery, warm backlit shelving, and velvet tub chairs over polished grey tile.

sections.title: Boardroom
sections.description: The boardroom, anchored by a long meeting table and grey velvet seating beneath crisp linear lighting.

renders.caption: The boardroom — a long table framed by grey velvet chairs, a wall-mounted screen, and backlit display shelving under sweeping lines of linear light.

sections.title: Meeting Room
sections.description: A second meeting setting where parallel lines of linear light draw the eye across the ceiling toward soft greenery and a dark glazed wall.

renders.caption: A meeting table beneath dramatic parallel lines of linear light, softened by greenery against a dark glazed backdrop.

sections.title: Open Workspace
sections.description: Open work zones in crisp white and black, with suspended planters and backlit niches keeping the modern palette bright and calm.

renders.caption: The open workspace — clean white desks with slim black frames and iMacs, lit by a floating planter that threads greenery through the space.
Workstations arranged in pairs beneath floating planters, balancing white surfaces, black detailing, and grey tile.

sections.title: Workstations
sections.description: A brighter workstation zone opening to floor-to-ceiling glazing and city views.

renders.caption: A bright workstation zone — white desks and suspended greenery set against floor-to-ceiling glazing with city views.
A focused single workstation framed by natural light and greenery — calm, minimal, and modern.

sections.title: Floor Plan
sections.description: The full layout of the Al-Ozaiba office and its zones.

renders.caption: The full floor plan of the Al-Ozaiba office — executive and private offices, boardroom, meeting room, open workspace, and service zones.

projects.title: Madinat Sultan Qaboos Office
projects.description: A second industrial headquarters for MERJAS — black-steel glazing, metal-grid ceilings, and freight-inspired details across reception, management, and open work.
projects.overview: An office and workspace design for MERJAS, a cargo, shipping and import–export company, at its Madinat Sultan Qaboos location. It carries the same industrial identity as the Al-Ozaiba headquarters — black-steel glazing, exposed metal-grid ceilings, and freight-inspired details — across reception, open work, management, and a coffee bar.

sections.title: Reception & Lounge
sections.description: A bold, atmospheric reception under warm and red accent lighting, with the MERJAS identity, crate seating, and a freight-inspired tyre table that speaks to the company's cargo world.

renders.caption: The reception — MERJAS branding under warm and red accent lighting, with crate seating and a tyre table that ties directly to the company's cargo identity.

sections.title: Open Office & Meeting
sections.description: A glass-walled meeting volume floating within the open office, defined by the industrial metal-grid ceiling and warmed by timber.

renders.caption: A glass-walled meeting volume within the open office, defined by the industrial metal-grid ceiling and warm timber.

sections.title: Management Office
sections.description: The management office behind black-steel glazing — warm timber desks, the MERJAS identity, and considered storage.

renders.caption: The management office behind black-steel glazing, with warm timber desks, the MERJAS identity, and integrated storage.

sections.title: Open Workspace
sections.description: Paired timber desks and ergonomic seating beneath the exposed metal-grid ceiling, anchored by a central planted spine.

renders.caption: The open workspace — paired timber desks and ergonomic seating beneath the exposed metal-grid ceiling.
Collaborative desks anchored by a central planted spine, bringing greenery into the raw industrial shell.

sections.title: Coffee Bar
sections.description: An informal break and meeting zone — a long communal table beneath pendant lights, set against concrete and open shelving.

renders.caption: The coffee bar and informal meeting zone — a long communal table beneath pendant lights, set against concrete and open shelving.

sections.title: Floor Plan
sections.description: The full layout of the Madinat Sultan Qaboos office and its zones.

renders.caption: The full floor plan of the Madinat Sultan Qaboos office — reception, management, open work, meeting, coffee bar, and service zones.

projects.title: Outdoor Terrace & Pergola
projects.description: An outdoor sanctuary that extends the living space — bespoke pergola structure, soft landscaping, and shaded seating areas.
projects.overview: An outdoor sanctuary that extends the living space beyond the walls — a bespoke pergola structure, soft landscaping, and carefully positioned shaded seating areas create a private retreat suited to Oman's climate.

slides.caption: A bespoke outdoor terrace and pergola designed to extend the living space — shaded, landscaped, and built for the Omani climate.

projects.title: Master Bedroom & Dressing Suite
projects.description: A serene retreat designed around the client's daily ritual — generous proportions, integrated storage, and soft tonal palette.
projects.overview: A serene retreat designed entirely around the client's daily ritual. Generous proportions, fully integrated storage, and a carefully considered soft tonal palette come together to create a bedroom and dressing suite that feels effortlessly calm.

slides.caption: Master bedroom and dressing suite — generous proportions, integrated joinery, and a soft tonal palette crafted around the client's daily ritual.

projects.title: Master Bathroom Transformation
projects.description: A complete transformation combining marble, gold fixtures, and bespoke joinery. Every surface speaks to refined luxury and functional precision.
projects.overview: A complete bathroom transformation that marries marble surfaces, brushed gold fixtures, and bespoke joinery into a single coherent language. Every finish was chosen to speak of refined luxury while remaining entirely functional in daily use.

slides.caption: A master bathroom transformation — marble, brushed gold fixtures, and bespoke joinery combined into a space of refined luxury and functional precision.
